questions.question: What is Vue's `v-model` equivalent to in React's controlled input pattern?
What does `<input v-model="name" />` compile to in Vue?
How does Vue handle multiple `v-model` bindings on a component compared to React?
options: Vue uses `v-model:name` and `v-model:email` syntax; React has no direct equivalent
Vue and React both use the same pattern with separate props
Vue requires a store for multiple two-way bindings
Vue's multiple v-model requires a plugin; React has this built-in
